task: Fix two dead routes: add /dispatch/planners index redirect to /loads; remove stale /tasks ComingSoonPage stub so real TaskBoardPage routes fire.
details: Bug 1: /dispatch/planners (bare) had no index route → fell through to /home. Fix: Navigate redirect to /dispatch/planners/loads.
Bug 2: /tasks route at line 3069 pointed to ComingSoonPage stub, shadowing the real TaskBoardPage/TasksCalendarPage/etc. routes at line 3329+. Fix: delete stub.
